arts.ttl: Hull City vs West Brom LIVE match updates and analysis from MKM Stadium
arts.sum: Cardiff City 1-3 Blackburn Rovers That point for Plymouth at Derby means City drop a place to 19th and still outside the drop zone on goal difference after both Cardiff City and Luton Town were beaten.

arts.ttl: Tim Walter shares his big Hull City hope and assesses West Brom challenge
arts.sum: But Walter has stressed it is a game his players will be determined to win and he hopes for a little bit of luck to go their way. That hasn't happened, with Walter retaining the backing of owner Acun Ilicali, despite a dismal start to the season with just three wins in the opening 14 games, including an early Carabao Cup exit at the hands of Sheffield Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Tim Walter's stay of execution at Hull City must spark upturn in fortunes
arts.sum: That hasn't happened yet, and while the Championship can be unpredictable, especially going into the final international break of the calendar year, which is often peak sacking time for nervous club owners with the pivotal Christmas period and then the January transfer window just around the corner, Ilicali remains determined to see Walter turn things around. Against a backdrop of significant anger from supporters after last Saturday's dismal 1-1 draw with Portsmouth, Walter's relationship with City supporters hit the depths on Tuesday when he was heckled throughout the second half of the 1-0 loss against Oxford United amid calls for him to be sacked.

arts.ttl: Hull vs West Brom predictions: Baggies may be set for yet another draw
arts.sum: Wins and goals have been hard to come by for both Hull and West Brom of late and Phil Agius expects the two teams to share the spoils on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Predicted Hull City line up for West Brom as Tim Walter faces another major selection poser
arts.sum: At the Kassam Stadium, Walter opted to bring back Kasey Palmer, Ryan Giles and Abdus Omur, and that trio will hope to keep their places in the starting XI as City go in search of a first win in seven attempts to lift some of the gloom surrounding the MKM Stadium. Kamara is rated as touch and go for the visit of Carlos Corberan's Baggies, but there is some positive news with Ryan Longman available for the first time this season after recovering from shoulder surgery, though any appearance will be from the bench with Walter suggesting a 25-minute cameo is likely.

arts.ttl: West Brom is the biggest match of the season so far, admits Kasey Palmer
arts.sum: City are without a win in their last six games, with three draws and three defeats in that run, the last of which came at Oxford United on Tuesday night, when Tim Walter was jeered by the away supporters, having seen his team booed off last weekend against bottom side Portsmouth. Sunday's home meeting with West Brom is the biggest game so far of this fledgling Championship season, according to Hull City's Kasey Palmer.

arts.ttl: Tim Walter issues passionate rallying cry to Hull City players as West Brom test looms
arts.sum: Walter says fans must realise the squad is not at the same level as last season, which saw Liam Rosenior able to call upon the likes of Jacob Greaves, Jean Michael Seri, Tyler Morton, Jaden Philogene, Liam Delap and Fabio Carvalho. "Maybe we are not as far as the team was last year because you had players like Philogene, Greaves, Delap, and Carvalho," he said.

arts.ttl: Hull City have five games to give suffering supporters reason to be positive
arts.sum: Only Burton Albion and Carlisle United have worse records at home so far in the calendar year and, as it stands, both of those are heading for relegation from League One and Two respectively. Watching City at home this year has been, for the most part, a chore.

arts.ttl: Preview: Hull City vs. West Bromwich Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Hull City and West Bromwich Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: ‘Close to promotion’ – Hull City boss Tim Walter has say on ‘experienced’ West Brom side
arts.sum: West Brom have been labelled as a ‘really experienced’ side by Hull City boss Tim Walter. West Brom… The post ‘Close to promotion’ – Hull City boss Tim Walter has say on ‘experienced’ West Brom side appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
